items.name: Irregular Choice Starry Love Jumpsuit
items.description: Show off your bold style with the Starry Love Jumpsuit! This eye-catching outfit features a pattern of blue and white stars, bringing a touch of the cosmos to your Roblox wardrobe. The standout detail is a big, bright red heart decal on the chest, adding a fun and playful pop of color. Perfect for Robloxians who love making a statement, this jumpsuit combines celestial vibes with a touch of sweetness. Whether you’re exploring or hanging out with friends, the Starry Love Jumpsuit is sure to keep you looking cool and feeling cozy!
